queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of maintaining no checking account status on credit default probability.
Determinants of default: The influence of extended loan duration in months on reducing credit risk and lowering default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: The effect of maintaining a negative checking account balance on decreasing default probability and improving creditworthiness.
